member.name: T:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.SortSetItemValidModelElementRuleAttribute
member.summary: Checks a validity of a datastructure sortset item - whether the name defined in "FieldName" corresponds with either a column defined on datastructure level or with an entity column provided that AllFields flag on datastructure entity is set.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IAssociation
member.summary: interface for associations (relationships between entities)

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IDataEntity
member.summary: Interface for data entities, which contain columns

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IDataEntity.EntityParameters
member.summary: Parameters of this data entity (in case the entity is query

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IDataEntity.EntityPrimaryKey
member.summary: Collection of expressions which make up a primary key of this data entity

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IDataEntity.EntityIsReadOnly
member.summary: Returns true if complete data entity is read only

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IDataEntity.EntityColumns
member.summary: Returns all columns of this data entity

member.summary: Returns all relations of this data entity

member.summary: Returns all indexes of this data entity

member.summary: Returns all security rules of this data entity

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IDataEntityColumn
member.summary: Interface for entity columns. Any expression that can represent a column will implement this interface.

member.summary: Tells if this column is read only.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please finish the global transaction and change parameters afterwards..
